title: EQ - Reset EQ and Save EQ becomes active only after moving slider
scenario: Reset EQ and Save EQ buttons remain disabled until a slider is moved in Custom EQ settings on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Observe the 'Reset EQ' and 'Save EQ' buttons
expected: 'Reset EQ' and 'Save EQ' buttons should be disabled (greyed out) until the user moves any slider in the Custom EQ settings. After moving a slider, both buttons should become enabled (active).
